default.company_name: Global Digital Energy & Building Services Company
default.text: A global leader in building infrastructure and energy management operating in over 100 countries — embedding predictive intelligence directly into building systems and services for institutional real estate portfolios.
One of the world's largest commercial insurers — contributing 20 years of normalized institutional claims data that transforms building signals into financially defensible risk scores.
